required_preferences.fact: Follows a strict daily preventive migraine regimen, including new medication and detailed trigger journaling; consults her headache diary before choosing any beverage or snack, not just avoiding caffeine

supersedes.fact: Avoids caffeine entirely due to migraines—only drinks herbal tea or water

required_preferences.fact: Now uses Thursday afternoons primarily for emergency teaching assignments or student support when necessary—research block is no longer strictly protected if coverage demands arise

supersedes.fact: Blocks Thursday afternoons exclusively for research—never schedules teaching or administrative tasks during this time

required_preferences.fact: Now uses a shared digital calendar with her spouse and daughter for tracking soccer practices, tournaments, and family schedules—never relies solely on her handwritten planner for logistics
Regularly joins carpools or organizes rides with other soccer families to manage tournament travel, prefers collaborative planning for transportation over solo driving
Plans family meals with a priority on low-carb, high-fiber dishes—never allows pasta or bread-based dinners at home
Silences phone notifications during evening hours—never responds to work messages after 7pm

persona: A tenured history professor at a major university
